description: Add appliance status landing behavior that detects setup mode and automatically redirects authenticated users from `/` to `/setup/`.
Add a prominent Continue setup CTA on the appliance `/` status page for setup-required or setup-reeditable states.
Restructure appliance `/setup/` into a progressive flow where install code entry is shown first and remaining setup fields are hidden until a code is entered.
Move appliance release channel and release pin controls under an Advanced disclosure on `/setup/`.
Change nm-store Essentials appliance registration action to return only non-secret confirmation fields to the browser.
Change nm-store Essentials appliance success UI to show email confirmation/instructions without rendering install code or ISO URL.
Change nm-store paid appliance thank-you flow to avoid displaying install code or ISO URL for newly registered and already-provisioned sessions.
Preserve server-side appliance registration/reissue email behavior so emails still contain the install code and stable ISO download link.
Add or update tests that prove browser-facing nm-store appliance actions/provisioning do not expose install code or download URL.
Run targeted validation for appliance UI and nm-store changed paths; document any residual warnings or unrelated failures.
